message:
feat(fnp-python): numpy.polynomial.hermite_e (herme*) wrappers (7a8q)

Add 15 passthrough wrappers for the probabilist's Hermite polynomial
family: hermeadd, hermesub, hermemul, hermediv, hermeval, hermeroots,
hermefromroots, hermepow, hermeline, hermemulx, hermetrim, hermeder,
hermeint, herme2poly, poly2herme.

All delegate to numpy.polynomial.hermite_e.* with matching signatures
preserving numpy's dtype, ValueError, and tuple-return contracts.
Closes the complete-gap noted on epic 0247: previously fnp_python
exposed only physicist's Hermite (herm*), so user code porting from
numpy.polynomial.hermite_e had no landing surface.

Parity test hermite_e_wrappers_match_numpy exercises every wrapper
against numpy.polynomial.hermite_e.<same_name> and asserts repr-exact
output across binary / unary / tol / value / deriv / integral / power
/ line signatures.

Part of franken_numpy-0247.
br-franken_numpy-7a8q
